bug_summary.summary: Login fails when user enters correct credentials.
bug_summary.details:
Login fails when user enters correct credentials.
Expected: successful login
Actual: application crashes
Environment: Python 3.10

evidence.raw_sample:
INFO: Starting application
Error: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'upper'
at UserService.login(UserService.java:45)
Random log line

fix_plan.root_cause: User object is None causing attribute error
fix_plan.patch_plan: Add null check before calling methods on user
validation: Add unit test for null user
fix_plan.review: Fix is valid. Consider edge cases like empty input and invalid types.
